claims.summary: Technical duration and hashes cannot stand in for how continuity or texture felt.
claims.disposition: Verified the current technical scopes and mechanical-only witness boundary.

claims.summary: Divergence and direct-causation fields risk turning relational texture into a latent state model.
claims.disposition: Verified their removal from current production witnesses while preserving historical readers.

claims.summary: Add a subjective continuity index and a causality enum to the capture schema.
claims.disposition: Route any future continuity or agency comparison to a separately adopted Concordance contract; do not reintroduce the later-rejected production map.
